label: Al-Shabaab Territorial Control
contestNote: Al-Shabaab claims broader rural influence; SNA disputes any meaningful control figures
deltaNote: Despite losses, group maintains shadow governance in rural south/central

label: Annual Conflict Events (ACLED)
deltaNote: Increase driven by SNA/clan militia offensives and Al-Shabaab counter-attacks

label: Internally Displaced Persons
contestNote: Figures fluctuate with seasonal displacement and returns
deltaNote: One of Africa's largest IDP crises

label: Food Insecure Population
contestNote: WFP cut food assistance from 2.2M to 600,000 recipients by Dec 2025 due to funding collapse; potential complete halt by Apr 2026
deltaNote: Funding crisis may reverse gains: 1.85M children under 5 face acute malnutrition risk

label: Al-Shabaab Annual Revenue
source: UN Monitoring Group 2024 / Africa Center for Strategic Studies
contestNote: Includes Houthi-linked revenue sharing since 2024; FGS claims lower; charcoal, taxation, piracy, and extortion documented

label: AUSSOM Authorized Strength
deltaNote: AUSSOM (AU Support and Stabilization Mission) operational Jan 1, 2025; underfunded; Ethiopia excluded by FGS; Uganda threatened withdrawal after 20 Ugandan peacekeepers killed

label: Confirmed US Airstrikes (2007–2025)
contestNote: Civilian casualties disputed; AFRICOM claims minimal collateral, Airwars documents credible civilian harm in multiple strikes

label: SNA Estimated Strength
contestNote: Ghost soldier problem; actual combat-ready forces significantly lower; payroll fraud endemic
